channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

Is OpenAI losing AI dominance despite its first-mover advantage, or does AI leadership now belong to the company w… [OpenAI, Anthropic, ServiceNow]

item.title: Billionaire investor Dan Loeb dismisses AI bubble talk: 'We're barely scratching the surface'
item.description: Dan Loeb said he doesn't see a "valuation bubble" in AI, and pointed to Anthropic's rapid progress and Big Tech's earnings and cash generation. [Anthropic]

item.title: Meta vs Microsoft Stocks 2026: Which Tech Giant Is the Better Buy?
item.description: In 2026, Meta and Microsoft are key players in AI, each with unique strategies. Meta focuses on advertising and AI innovation, while Microsoft offers diversified growth through cloud and enterprise solutions. [Microsoft, Meta]

item.title: In China, AMD CEO Lisa Su is understated while Nvidia's Huang is more razzmatazz
item.description: AMD CEO Lisa Su visited China, maintaining a low profile unlike Nvidia's Jensen Huang. This reflects differing strategies in China's crucial AI chip market. While Nvidia's market share has dropped significantly, AMD holds a smaller but more diversified pres… [Nvidia, AMD]

item.title: Samsung vs SK Hynix Stocks 2026: AI Memory Boom — Which Chip Giant Wins the Race?
item.description: Samsung and SK Hynix, South Korea's leading memory chipmakers, report record profits in 2026, driven by high demand for AI-related memory products, positioning them as key players in the global market. [Samsung]

item.title: Dell Stock Surges Over 30% on Explosive AI Earnings Beat and Raised Guidance
item.description: Dell Technologies' shares soared over 30% following impressive first-quarter results, driven by AI server demand and a raised full-year outlook, highlighting its pivotal role in the AI infrastructure boom. [Dell Technologies]

item.title: Tom Steyer Is Prepared to Take On the AI Billionaires
item.description:
John Nichols
The California gubernatorial candidate understands exactly what’s at stake, as he explains in an exclusive interview.
The post Tom Steyer Is Prepared to Take On the AI Billionaires appeared first on The Nation. [Uber]
